creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
update ISC dhcp to the latest version, which is 3.0b2pl14.

	Makefile
		version bumbed.
		DISTNAME heuristic changed.
		maintainer updated.
		long lines wrapped.
		makefiles patch loop changed from files to dirs.

	distinfo
		updated.

	pkg-plist
		updated.

	files/patch-freebsd
		user.notice -> !!USE_FACILITY!!.notice

How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
